allow: Bash(dotnet new razorclasslib -n LilyBlazorHeadless -o src/LilyBlazorHeadless --framework net10.0)
Bash(dotnet new xunit -n LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests -o tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests --framework net10.0)
Bash(dotnet sln add src/LilyBlazorHeadless/LilyBlazorHeadless.csproj && dotnet sln add tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests.csproj)

Bash(cd /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/src/LilyBlazorHeadless/Components && for f in TabBar.razor TaskBar.razor MenuBar.razor; do sed -i '' 's/BarRef/_elementRef/g' "$f" && echo "Fixed $f"; done)
Bash(cd /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless && dotnet build 2>&1 | grep "error " | sed 's/\(.*//;s/.*Components\\///' | sort -u)

Bash(cd /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests/Components && find . -name "*.cs" -exec sed -i '' 's/RenderComponent</Render</g' {} + && echo "Fixed all test files")

Bash(cd /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests/Components && find . -name "*.cs" -exec sed -i '' 's/: TestContext/: BunitContext/g' {} + && find . -name "*.cs" -exec sed -i '' 's/Render</RenderComponent</g' {} + && echo "Done")

Bash(dotnet remove tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests.csproj package bunit && dotnet add tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests.csproj package bunit --version "1.35.9")

Bash(echo "Components:" && ls src/LilyBlazorHeadless/Components/*.razor | wc -l && echo "Code-behind:" && ls src/LilyBlazorHeadless/Components/*.razor.cs | wc -l && echo "Tests:" && ls tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests/Components/*Tests.cs | wc -l)

Bash(cd /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/src/LilyBlazorHeadless/Components && for f in *.razor; do [[ "$f" == *.razor.cs ]] && continue; grep -l 'aria-label="@Label"' "$f" | xargs -I {} grep -l '^\\s*label="@Label"' {} 2>/dev/null; done | wc -l)

Bash(cd /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/src/LilyBlazorHeadless/Components && for f in *.razor; do [[ "$f" == *.razor.cs ]] && continue; head -3 "$f" | grep -oP '\(?<=^<\)\\w+' | head -1; done | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn)

Bash(cd /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/src/LilyBlazorHeadless/Components && for f in *.razor; do [[ "$f" == *.razor.cs ]] && continue; sed -n '2p' "$f" | grep -o '^<[a-z]*' | sed 's/^<//'; done | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn)
Bash(dotnet test --no-build 2>&1 | grep "^  Failed " | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn)
Bash(python3 generate_tests.py && dotnet build 2>&1 | tail -3 && dotnet test --no-build 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(dotnet build 2>&1 | tail -5 && dotnet test --no-build 2>&1 | tail -3)

Bash(echo "=== Component files ===" && ls /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/src/LilyBlazorHeadless/Components/*.razor | wc -l && echo "=== Test files ===" && ls /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/tests/LilyBlazorHeadless.Tests/Components/*Tests.cs | wc -l && echo "=== Doc files ===" && ls /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/docs/components/*.md | wc -l && echo "=== Scripts ===" && ls /Users/jph/git/lilydesignsystem/lily-blazor-headless/*.py)
